name.full: OPC UA Expert — OPC UA Knowledge Base for Microsoft 365 Copilot

description.short: Expert assistant for OPC UA specifications and NodeSets.
description.full: OPC UA Expert is a Microsoft 365 Copilot agent that provides expert assistance with OPC UA (IEC 62541) specifications, NodeSets, companion specifications, and compliance. It searches 180,000+ indexed documents from reference.opcfoundation.org, validates NodeSet XMLs against OPC 11030 best practices, compares versions for breaking changes, and provides modelling guidance. Works in Microsoft 365 Copilot, Teams, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook.
